title: horkelia lycopodioides
intro: Horkelia lycopodioides, also known as creeping horkelia or fernleaf horkelia, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Horkelia lycopodioides include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. Horkelia lycopodioides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried powder for medicinal use.
